## Meeting Purpose

Introductory call between Marcel Santilli (GrowthX) and Zacharias Xiroudakis to explore potential collaboration opportunities.

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX has grown rapidly to \~$7M ARR in 8 months with 40+ clients, aiming for $22-25M ARR by year-end](https://fathom.video/share/hrzgqYzqBsThLyyEmeq-z9TT5F3HWGe4?tab=summary&timestamp=596.0)
  - [Company leverages advanced AI workflows and top talent to deliver high-quality, scalable content/growth services](https://fathom.video/share/hrzgqYzqBsThLyyEmeq-z9TT5F3HWGe4?tab=summary&timestamp=1279.0)
  - [Seeking to hire experienced professionals like Zacharias to help scale operations and showcase capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/hrzgqYzqBsThLyyEmeq-z9TT5F3HWGe4?tab=summary&timestamp=1406.0)
  - [Open to exploring a contractor relationship with Zacharias, potentially offering \>$40k compensation](https://fathom.video/share/hrzgqYzqBsThLyyEmeq-z9TT5F3HWGe4?tab=summary&timestamp=1577.0)

## Topics

### Participant Backgrounds

  - [Zacharias: Content marketing specialist → led acquisition channels at Minuttia (2.5 years)](https://fathom.video/share/hrzgqYzqBsThLyyEmeq-z9TT5F3HWGe4?tab=summary&timestamp=78.0)
  - Marcel:
      - [Built content hubs for IBM ($17M revenue) and HP (1M monthly visitors)](https://fathom.video/share/hrzgqYzqBsThLyyEmeq-z9TT5F3HWGe4?tab=summary&timestamp=253.0)
      - [CMO roles at HashiCorp, ServiceNow, DeepGram (24x traffic growth)](https://fathom.video/share/hrzgqYzqBsThLyyEmeq-z9TT5F3HWGe4?tab=summary&timestamp=338.0)
      - [Founded GrowthX in Sept 2022, leveraging AI workflows for content/growth](https://fathom.video/share/hrzgqYzqBsThLyyEmeq-z9TT5F3HWGe4?tab=summary&timestamp=447.0)

### GrowthX Overview

  - [Founded Sept 2022, announced Nov 2022](https://fathom.video/share/hrzgqYzqBsThLyyEmeq-z9TT5F3HWGe4?tab=summary&timestamp=503.0)
  - Current metrics:
      - [\~$7M ARR](https://fathom.video/share/hrzgqYzqBsThLyyEmeq-z9TT5F3HWGe4?tab=summary&timestamp=596.0)
      - [40+ clients](https://fathom.video/share/hrzgqYzqBsThLyyEmeq-z9TT5F3HWGe4?tab=summary&timestamp=873.0)
      - [50% win rate on deals](https://fathom.video/share/hrzgqYzqBsThLyyEmeq-z9TT5F3HWGe4?tab=summary&timestamp=596.0)
  - [Raised $12M Series A with high software multiples](https://fathom.video/share/hrzgqYzqBsThLyyEmeq-z9TT5F3HWGe4?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
  - [Projecting $22-25M ARR by end of 2023 (100-120 clients)](https://fathom.video/share/hrzgqYzqBsThLyyEmeq-z9TT5F3HWGe4?tab=summary&timestamp=596.0)
  - Limited marketing so far (4 LinkedIn posts in 4 months)
  - [High-profile clients: Webflow, Ramp, Reddit, Yellow AI](https://fathom.video/share/hrzgqYzqBsThLyyEmeq-z9TT5F3HWGe4?tab=summary&timestamp=650.0)

### GrowthX Service Approach

  - [AI-powered workflows represented as code (not low-code tools)](https://fathom.video/share/hrzgqYzqBsThLyyEmeq-z9TT5F3HWGe4?tab=summary&timestamp=1279.0)
  - [Thousands of processes run in parallel, continuously improving](https://fathom.video/share/hrzgqYzqBsThLyyEmeq-z9TT5F3HWGe4?tab=summary&timestamp=1486.0)
  - [Extensive research and multi-step content creation process](https://fathom.video/share/hrzgqYzqBsThLyyEmeq-z9TT5F3HWGe4?tab=summary&timestamp=1298.0)
  - [\~$10 in compute costs per article, prioritizing quality over margin optimization](https://fathom.video/share/hrzgqYzqBsThLyyEmeq-z9TT5F3HWGe4?tab=summary&timestamp=1345.0)
  - [2-week initial calibration process to align on client's "bullseye" (quality, style, tone)](https://fathom.video/share/hrzgqYzqBsThLyyEmeq-z9TT5F3HWGe4?tab=summary&timestamp=1237.0)

### Team Building & Expansion

  - Recently hired:
      - [Head of Go-to-Market](https://fathom.video/share/hrzgqYzqBsThLyyEmeq-z9TT5F3HWGe4?tab=summary&timestamp=1406.0)
      - [Chief Content Officer (former Editor-in-Chief of major publication)](https://fathom.video/share/hrzgqYzqBsThLyyEmeq-z9TT5F3HWGe4?tab=summary&timestamp=1406.0)
      - [Jacob (ex-G2.com, SoftwareAdvice, ActiveCampaign)](https://fathom.video/share/hrzgqYzqBsThLyyEmeq-z9TT5F3HWGe4?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
      - [Dave (ex-Fanatics, e-commerce expert)](https://fathom.video/share/hrzgqYzqBsThLyyEmeq-z9TT5F3HWGe4?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)
  - [Hiring top engineering talent (e.g., early Airbnb, Stripe engineers)](https://fathom.video/share/hrzgqYzqBsThLyyEmeq-z9TT5F3HWGe4?tab=summary&timestamp=1438.0)
  - [Considering future agency acquisitions to expand capabilities/verticals](https://fathom.video/share/hrzgqYzqBsThLyyEmeq-z9TT5F3HWGe4?tab=summary&timestamp=951.0)

### Client Focus

  - [Primarily US/Canada-based, 2 in UK, 1 in Mexico](https://fathom.video/share/hrzgqYzqBsThLyyEmeq-z9TT5F3HWGe4?tab=summary&timestamp=1064.0)
  - [Many technical brands targeting developers](https://fathom.video/share/hrzgqYzqBsThLyyEmeq-z9TT5F3HWGe4?tab=summary&timestamp=1099.0)
  - [Most successful with clients who've experienced content scaling challenges](https://fathom.video/share/hrzgqYzqBsThLyyEmeq-z9TT5F3HWGe4?tab=summary&timestamp=1222.0)

### Next Steps for Zacharias

  - [Schedule follow-up deep-dive meeting](https://fathom.video/share/hrzgqYzqBsThLyyEmeq-z9TT5F3HWGe4?tab=summary&timestamp=1596.0)
  - [Introduction to Kyle (client oversight)](https://fathom.video/share/hrzgqYzqBsThLyyEmeq-z9TT5F3HWGe4?tab=summary&timestamp=1596.0)
  - [Explore contractor relationship (\>$40k compensation range mentioned)](https://fathom.video/share/hrzgqYzqBsThLyyEmeq-z9TT5F3HWGe4?tab=summary&timestamp=1577.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel's EA to schedule follow-up meeting with Zacharias](https://fathom.video/share/hrzgqYzqBsThLyyEmeq-z9TT5F3HWGe4?tab=summary&timestamp=1596.0)
  - [Introduce Zacharias to Kyle for further discussions](https://fathom.video/share/hrzgqYzqBsThLyyEmeq-z9TT5F3HWGe4?tab=summary&timestamp=1596.0)
